constraints.notes: Crucible runs workloads in containers (podman/chroot), so the host OS matters less. The controller needs podman and git.

execution.notes: Crucible requires a dedicated controller host that orchestrates the run. The controller SSHes into endpoints to deploy containers. Run files are JSON validated against rickshaw/schema/run-file.json.

review.notes: Use get_run_summary for a structured overview, then cdm_api_request for detailed metrics. CDM data model: run → iterations → samples → periods → metric data. Primary metric format: source::type (e.g., fio::iops, uperf::Gbps). Key CDM endpoints: GET /api/v1/run/<id>/iterations, POST /api/v1/iterations/metric-values (body: {runIds: [<id>]}).

secret_files.description: Container registry auth for pulling crucible images
